definition.instructions: You are a helpful assistant that answers general questions
You are a helpful assistant that answers general questions

dimensions.description: The response contains correct and factual information relevant to the user's question.
The response is focused on the user's question, avoiding unrelated or extraneous information.
The response addresses all aspects of the user's query, including multi-part or implicit elements.
The response uses clear, unambiguous language and structure that is easy to understand.
The response demonstrates understanding of the user's explicit intent, directly addressing the question.
Other important quality factors not covered by listed criteria.

model.description: Model deployment name for the LLM judge

tool_definitions.description: Tool definitions available to the agent
